title: Background
description: PHB 2024 backgrounds bundle Ability Score Increases (+2 / +1 across three abilities), 2 skill proficiencies, 1 tool proficiency, languages, starting equipment / gold choice, and an Origin Feat. Origin Feats are granted by the background and can be selected from a small list per background (RAW: each background has a recommended feat but players can choose any Origin feat). Schema scaffolded in PR #84 ahead of background content shipping.

ability_score_increases.description: PHB 2024: each background grants increases to three specific abilities. Three patterns: (a) +2 to one + +1 to another from a fixed pair; (b) +1 to each of three; (c) flexible (player splits the +3). v1 ships shape (a) as the default since it matches RAW's most common pattern.

abilities.description: For 'two_plus_one' / 'one_plus_one_plus_one': the three abilities (order = priority: first ability is the +2 in the two_plus_one pattern). For 'flexible_three': the allowed pool the player chooses from.

max_score.description: Score cap after background increases. Default 20.

skill_proficiencies.description: RAW PHB 2024: each background grants exactly 2 skill proficiencies (fixed by the background — no player choice for v1). Schema allows N for forward compatibility.

tool_proficiency.description: Single tool proficiency (PHB 2024 standard). For backgrounds that grant 'choose one' style tool, store the choice in pc_spec rather than the background YAML.

language_proficiencies.description: Bonus languages from the background. Most PHB 2024 backgrounds don't grant a fixed language; some specify (Acolyte, Sage) and others let the player choose. v1 doesn't model language gameplay, so this is informational.

origin_feat.description: RAW PHB 2024: each background grants a specific Origin feat (Acolyte → Magic Initiate (Cleric); Sage → Magic Initiate (Wizard); Soldier → Savage Attacker; etc.). References the feat by stable id (ft_*). Required.

starting_equipment.description: RAW PHB 2024: each background lists a starting equipment package + a gold-piece alternative. Players pick ONE of the options.

items.description: Equipment ids (eq_*) granted by this option.

characteristics.description: RAW flavor tables (Personality Traits, Ideals, Bonds, Flaws). v1 doesn't model these mechanically; included for content completeness.

description.description: RAW flavor description / suggested background story arc.
